description: Style Note Gear up this summer for the IPL tournment with your favourite team's T-shirt for men. Sport this trendy tee from nike and be true to your city! Product Details Black T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves, Nike logo on the left chest, Kolkata logo on the front in slightly distressed print and 'Be true to your city' printed on the nape of the neck Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on decorations
